name: device-matrix-hud-shop
description: Regression matrix for the gameplay HUD and functional Hero Fist Shop at five landscape desktop, tablet, and phone resolutions.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local S=game:GetService('StudioDeviceSimulatorService') local n='VQC Desktop 1920x1080' local id for _,x in ipairs(S:GetDeviceListAsync()) do if S:GetDeviceInfoAsync(x).Name==n then id=x break end end local c={Name=n,Width=1920,Height=1080,PixelDensity=96,DeviceForm=Enum.DeviceForm.Desktop} if id then S:UpdateDeviceAsync(id,c) else id=S:CreateDeviceAsync(c) end S:SetDeviceAsync(id) S:SetScalingModeAsync(Enum.DeviceSimulatorScalingMode.FitToWindow) task.wait(.3) local r=S:GetResolutionAsync() return H:JSONEncode({name=n,width=r.X,height=r.Y,active=S:GetDeviceAsync()==id})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local h=g.PixelPerfectHeroCityHUD local names={'PowerValue','CoinsValue','DepthValue','ObjectiveText'} local fit=true for _,n in ipairs(names) do local x=h:FindFirstChild(n,true) fit=fit and x~=nil and x.TextFits end local p=h.ActionPunch local j=h.ActionJump return H:JSONEncode({fit=fit,punch=math.min(p.AbsoluteSize.X,p.AbsoluteSize.Y)>=44,jump=math.min(j.AbsoluteSize.X,j.AbsoluteSize.Y)>=44,menu=not g.GameMenu.Visible})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD g.GameMenu.Visible=true g:SetAttribute('AutomationTab','Fists') task.wait(2) local s=g.GameMenu.FunctionalHeroShop local small,notFit,cards=0,0,0 local tabBottom=-math.huge local cardTop=math.huge for _,d in ipairs(s:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA('GuiButton') and d.Visible and math.min(d.AbsoluteSize.X,d.AbsoluteSize.Y)<44 then small+=1 end if (d:IsA('TextLabel') or d:IsA('TextButton')) and d.Visible and not d.TextFits then notFit+=1 end if d:IsA('Frame') and string.find(d.Name,'ShopCard',1,true) then cards+=1 cardTop=math.min(cardTop,d.AbsolutePosition.Y) end if d.Name=='FistsShopTab' or d.Name=='BoostsShopTab' then tabBottom=math.max(tabBottom,d.AbsolutePosition.Y+d.AbsoluteSize.Y) end end return H:JSONEncode({visible=s.Visible,small=small,notFit=notFit,cards=cards,gap=cardTop>=tabBottom})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local S=game:GetService('StudioDeviceSimulatorService') local n='VQC Desktop 1366x768' local id for _,x in ipairs(S:GetDeviceListAsync()) do if S:GetDeviceInfoAsync(x).Name==n then id=x break end end local c={Name=n,Width=1366,Height=768,PixelDensity=96,DeviceForm=Enum.DeviceForm.Desktop} if id then S:UpdateDeviceAsync(id,c) else id=S:CreateDeviceAsync(c) end S:SetDeviceAsync(id) S:SetScalingModeAsync(Enum.DeviceSimulatorScalingMode.FitToWindow) task.wait(.3) local r=S:GetResolutionAsync() return H:JSONEncode({name=n,width=r.X,height=r.Y,active=S:GetDeviceAsync()==id})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local h=g.PixelPerfectHeroCityHUD local names={'PowerValue','CoinsValue','DepthValue','ObjectiveText'} local fit=true for _,n in ipairs(names) do local x=h:FindFirstChild(n,true) fit=fit and x~=nil and x.TextFits end local p=h.ActionPunch local j=h.ActionJump return H:JSONEncode({fit=fit,punch=math.min(p.AbsoluteSize.X,p.AbsoluteSize.Y)>=44,jump=math.min(j.AbsoluteSize.X,j.AbsoluteSize.Y)>=44,menu=not g.GameMenu.Visible})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD g.GameMenu.Visible=true g:SetAttribute('AutomationTab','Fists') task.wait(2) local s=g.GameMenu.FunctionalHeroShop local small,notFit,cards=0,0,0 local tabBottom=-math.huge local cardTop=math.huge for _,d in ipairs(s:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA('GuiButton') and d.Visible and math.min(d.AbsoluteSize.X,d.AbsoluteSize.Y)<44 then small+=1 end if (d:IsA('TextLabel') or d:IsA('TextButton')) and d.Visible and not d.TextFits then notFit+=1 end if d:IsA('Frame') and string.find(d.Name,'ShopCard',1,true) then cards+=1 cardTop=math.min(cardTop,d.AbsolutePosition.Y) end if d.Name=='FistsShopTab' or d.Name=='BoostsShopTab' then tabBottom=math.max(tabBottom,d.AbsolutePosition.Y+d.AbsoluteSize.Y) end end return H:JSONEncode({visible=s.Visible,small=small,notFit=notFit,cards=cards,gap=cardTop>=tabBottom})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local S=game:GetService('StudioDeviceSimulatorService') local n='VQC Tablet 1024x768' local id for _,x in ipairs(S:GetDeviceListAsync()) do if S:GetDeviceInfoAsync(x).Name==n then id=x break end end local c={Name=n,Width=1024,Height=768,PixelDensity=160,DeviceForm=Enum.DeviceForm.Tablet} if id then S:UpdateDeviceAsync(id,c) else id=S:CreateDeviceAsync(c) end S:SetDeviceAsync(id) S:SetOrientationAsync(Enum.ScreenOrientation.LandscapeLeft) S:SetScalingModeAsync(Enum.DeviceSimulatorScalingMode.FitToWindow) task.wait(.3) local r=S:GetResolutionAsync() return H:JSONEncode({name=n,width=r.X,height=r.Y,active=S:GetDeviceAsync()==id})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local S=game:GetService('StudioDeviceSimulatorService') local n='VQC Phone 740x360' local id for _,x in ipairs(S:GetDeviceListAsync()) do if S:GetDeviceInfoAsync(x).Name==n then id=x break end end local c={Name=n,Width=740,Height=360,PixelDensity=326,DeviceForm=Enum.DeviceForm.Phone} if id then S:UpdateDeviceAsync(id,c) else id=S:CreateDeviceAsync(c) end S:SetDeviceAsync(id) S:SetOrientationAsync(Enum.ScreenOrientation.LandscapeLeft) S:SetScalingModeAsync(Enum.DeviceSimulatorScalingMode.FitToWindow) task.wait(.3) local r=S:GetResolutionAsync() return H:JSONEncode({name=n,width=r.X,height=r.Y,active=S:GetDeviceAsync()==id})

local S=game:GetService('StudioDeviceSimulatorService') S:StopSimulationAsync() task.wait(.2) local names={['VQC Desktop 1920x1080']=true,['VQC Desktop 1366x768']=true,['VQC Tablet 1024x768']=true,['VQC Phone 844x390']=true,['VQC Phone 740x360']=true} local removed=0 for _,id in ipairs(S:GetDeviceListAsync()) do local info=S:GetDeviceInfoAsync(id) if names[info.Name] and info.IsCustom then S:RemoveDeviceAsync(id) removed+=1 end end return {default=S:GetDeviceAsync()=='default',removed=removed}
local S=game:GetService('StudioDeviceSimulatorService') pcall(function() S:StopSimulationAsync() end) return true
